name: next-runtime-snapshot-example
description: End-to-end devframe demo — Next.js App Router SPA over RPC, exposing the host Node runtime snapshot (system info, memory, env).

scripts.build: next build src/client && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist/client',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('src/client/out','dist/client',{recursive:true});"
